title: The Deep Void
description: Makes it possible to get into the dimension under the bedrock.
body:
Adds new weapons, blocks, items, tools and armor.

Find the monolith while traveling around the world and travel to another dimension.

The dimension consists of new dead soil as well as various plants.
Already at the time of the first version the mod is quite passable.

The mod can partially add to the game's story.

The user should download the mod, as there is an active development, and the content will only be added to the game

If you find a bug, feel free to write a comment.
